game_name: Gargoyle's Quest II: The Demon Darkness

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Vertical cliff traversal, enables escape from threats
Enables previously inaccessible vertical areas, temporary platform reliance

element_introduction_order.element: Health-gated boss encounters (significantly higher enemy health)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Confined rooms force confrontation; cannot bypass

element_introduction_order.element: Enchanted item upgrades (glide duration, jump height, stamina)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Power scaling mechanic; player becomes progressively stronger

typical_tension_triggers: Vertical climbing sections with time pressure
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating exploration/dialogue phases (overworld towns) with intense action platforming segments; difficulty ramps gradually but creates necessary combat confrontations in confined spaces

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Town buildings can be entered; suggests exploration of non-critical paths for items and dialogue

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduces basic combat and platforming mechanics (projectiles, gliding, wall climbing) in manageable fashion; player moves notably slow, creating mandatory combat encounters rather than avoidance options
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Magic Tornado power-up expands vertical traversal possibilities; enchanted item progression increases player power; health-gated boss encounters in confined rooms require extended combat
difficulty_curve.late_game: Compounded complexity combining all learned mechanics; sustained difficulty maintained through enemy design rather than dramatic spikes
notable_spikes: First major boss defeat (Nagus) required to advance plot
Health-gated confined room bosses that cannot be bypassed
Late-game vertical areas requiring Magic Tornado mastery

notable_level_patterns.description: Semi-linear overhead map navigation between towns. Towns contain NPCs for dialogue, stone buildings to enter, and plot advancement. Functions as relief phase between action segments and supplies context/progression

Side-scrolling platformer sections in confined spaces (dungeons, pit areas). Emphasize enemy combat, vertical traversal, and resource management. Firebrand's slow movement speed forces confrontation rather than evasion
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Generic dungeon, giant pit crossing area

notable_level_patterns.description: Requires wall-cling mechanic mastery. Often paired with time pressure or falling hazards. Demonstrates skill-gating through movement ability requirements

Confined enclosed space with significantly higher-health enemy. Cannot flee or bypass. Requires sustained offensive pressure and precision dodging. Narrative importance (plot advancement gated behind boss defeat)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Nagus encounter, various mid/late-game boss rooms
